Veervaaso Technologies Limited (Indira Capital Exchange: VRSO) — Internal Compliance Memorandum re DPDPA and SEBI PIT, 29‑May‑2026.
To: Board, Audit Committee, and DPO (Ms. Sachi Rao) — dpo@veervaaso.in; from: Compliance Cell (Mr. Arvind Sen) — compliance@veervaaso.in.
Summary: personal data under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 is handled per our DPA Schedule AV‑DPA‑2026; “child” is treated as under 18 and onboarding forms capture guardian consent where applicable.
Cross‑border transfer: Data Export Approval AV‑XFER‑014 granted on 15‑May‑2026 for limited telemetry to ZangaCloud Pte Ltd (SG) with SCC‑style clauses; see https://xport.veervaaso.in/download?dsar=REQ-AV-2026-019&token=a9c%2F2f‑sig.
Completed control: production masking of national IDs is enforced; Aadhaar fields were dropped from CRM as of 01‑Apr‑2026 and legacy backups scrubbed under JOB‑TRN‑009; we store only last4 (A a d h a a r: 9 0 1 2) and salted hashes.
DSAR: REQ‑AV‑2026‑1098 (http://portal.veervaaso.in/dsar/REQ-%E2%80%8B1098) sought access and erasure for marketing purposes; erasure completed on 18‑May‑2026 with certificate AV‑ERS‑221, retention schedule 2.3 updated.
Consent withdrawal: Master Rahul T. (DoB 14‑Feb‑2009) via guardian Mrs. Tara Thakur withdrew consent CNST‑2 0 2 6‑4 3 on 21‑May‑2026; processing halted, records minimised to token v‑rahul‑t‑… and purpose changed to “compliance log”.
Onboarding forms (test environment only) display masked IDs — PAN: A B C P X 1 2 3 4 D; GSTIN: 2 7 A B C A A 0 0 0 0 A 1 Z 9 — these are dummies and not linked to any data principal.
Device data: we do not collect device MAC addresses; the string 00:00:00:00:00:00 appears solely in unit tests and is not persisted; configs citing “Public MoHFW advisory v2025” are public‑source references.
SEBI PIT: a rights issue proposal for our listed equity (Indira Capital Exchange (ICE): VRSO) was UPSI until disclosure on 24‑May‑2026 (ICE filing REF‑ICE‑2026‑RI‑07); the trading window reopened for designated persons on 27‑May‑2026.
Negative confirmation: no payroll files containing PAN/Aadhaar left India; cross‑border export under AV‑XFER‑014 included only aggregate, non‑identifiable telemetry and excluded children’s data.
Retention/minimisation: call‑detail logs are retained 90 days; beyond 90 days only last‑4 of phone and order hash remain; erasure policy POL‑ERS‑5.1 executed weekly (cron id batch‑ers‑sun‑02).
Note on vendor onboarding: DPA Addendum with Vidyut Analytics GmbH (DE) is approved but dormant; the planned analytics stream is paused and no data flows are active as of this memo.
This memo does not authorize trading and contains no unpublished price‑sensitive information as of the date above; queries to legal@veervaaso.in or +91‑00000‑00000.
